# TNPSC101

> Aptitude and reasoning mock test platform for TNPSC, bank, SSC, and placement aspirants. Unlimited 25-question practice tests plus a weekly ranked Saturday Main Test.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of TNPSC101, features, and how the platform works.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in with email or Google to start practicing.
